problem id: 08b2b48d
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (ROT(1) AND NOT SHR(6)) XOR NOT SHL(4)

examples:
  01100001 -> 00101101
  10100101 -> 11100110
  10011000 -> 01001110
  00100101 -> 11100101
  00000011 -> 11001001
  01011001 -> 11011101
  10100011 -> 10001010
  10110000 -> 10011110

query: 11111010
predicted answer: 10101011
